lines.en_lit: Sitting in the courtyard is only for kings of the House of David, as it is stated: “Then King David went in and sat before the Lord” As Rav Ḥisda said in the women’s courtyard. Here, too, in the women’s courtyard,

And where was of Rav Ḥisda stated? in relation to the following: raised an objection which was taught Where did they read in the courtyard. Rabbi Eliezer ben Ya’akov says: on the Temple Mount, as it is stated “And he read from it before the wide road that was before the Gate of the Water” And Rav Ḥisda said: the women’s courtyard.

“And Ezra blessed the Lord, the great God” What is “great” Rav Yosef said Rav said: that he ascribed greatness to Him by explicit name. Rav Giddel said: “Blessed be the Lord, God of Israel, from eternity to eternity”
Abaye said to Rav Dimi: Perhaps that he ascribed greatness to Him by explicit name? said to him: The explicit name may not be enunciated in the provinces,

And not Isn’t it written: “And Ezra the Scribe stood upon a pulpit of wood, which they had made for the purpose... and Rav Giddel said: that he ascribed greatness to Him by explicit name. was a provisional edict

And they cried with a loud voice to the Lord God What was said? Rav said, and some say Rabbi Yoḥanan Woe, woe. It is this, that destroyed the Temple, and burned its Sanctuary, and murdered all the righteous ones, and caused the Jewish people to be exiled from their land. And it still dances among us, Didn’t You give it to us solely for the purpose of receiving reward We do not want it, and we do not want its reward.
a note fell to them from the heavens upon which was written: Truth,
Rav Ḥanina said: Learn from this the seal of the Holy One, Blessed be He, is truth.

they observed a fast for three days and three nights, and He delivered to them. A form of a fiery lion cub came forth from the chamber of the Holy of Holies. the prophet said to the Jewish people: This is the inclination for idol worship, as it is stated “And he said: This is the evil one”

When they caught hold of it one of its hairs fell, and it let out a shriek that was heard for four hundred parasangs. They said: What we do Perhaps, Heaven forfend, they will have mercy upon him from Heaven, The prophet said to them: Throw it into a container of lead and seal the opening with lead, since lead absorbs sound. As it is stated: “And he said: This is the evil one. And he cast it down into the midst of the measure, and he cast a stone of lead upon its opening”
said: Since it is an auspicious time, let us pray also concerning the inclination for sin They prayed, and it was delivered into their hands.

said to them: See that if you kill the world will be destroyed they imprisoned it for three days. searched for a fresh egg throughout all of Eretz Yisrael and could not find They said: What we do? we kill it, the world will be destroyed. we pray for half, Heaven does not grant half They gouged its eyes, and set it free. And was effective that a person is no aroused to his relatives.
In the West, they taught as follows: Rav Giddel said: “Great” that he ascribed greatness to Him by explicit name. And Rav Mattana said: “The great, the mighty, and the awesome God”

This Rav Mattana leans to, of Rabbi Yehoshua ben Levi. As Rabbi Yehoshua ben Levi said: Why are called the members of the Great Assembly? because they returned the crown to its former Moses came said “The great, the mighty, and the awesomeGod” Jeremiah came and said: Gentiles, are carousing in His sanctuary; where is His awesomeness? he did not say awesome Daniel came said: Gentiles are enslaving His children; where is His might? he did not say mighty

came and said: On the contrary, this is the might of His might, that He conquers His inclination that He exercises patience toward the wicked. And these His awesomeness: Were it not for the awesomeness of the Holy One, Blessed be He, how could one people, survive among the nations?

And the Rabbis, how could they do this and uproot an ordinance instituted by Moses, Rabbi Elazar said: because they knew of the Holy One Blessed be He, that He is truthful Consequently, they did not speak falsely about Him.
And he reads “After the death” and “But on the tenth” raises a contradiction: One skip in the Prophets, but one not skip in the Torah.
This is not difficult: There, of such length that the translator will conclude Here, of such length that the translator will not conclude

But it was taught concerning this One skip in the Prophets, and one not skip in the Torah. And how much one skip? when the of length that the translator will not have concluded but the Torah, not at all.
Abaye said: This is not difficult. Here, pertain to a single topic, There, pertain to two topics.

As it was taught One skip in the Torah pertain to one topic, and in the Prophets pertain to two topics. here and there, when of such length that the translator will not have concluded one not skip from one Prophets to another Prophets among the Twelve Prophets one may skip,
